title: Cyrsed Mod: Herobrine
description: A Cyrsed Mod extension adding Herobrine
body:
# What is **Cyrsed Mod**?

Cyrsed Mod is the base horror mod foundation for the Herobrine extension. And If you are a modder, you can actually freely make an extension of it!

# What is in **Cyrsed Mod: Herobrine**?

**Cyrsed Mod: Herobrine** adds obviously herobrine which can appear and give you a scare until eventually he kills you*


_*Note that some things like herobrine eventually killing you on a timeline are merely ideas and not in the mod yet._
